subject: BlueWave Health Google Calendar free/busy unavailable for interview scheduling
summary: BlueWave Health recruiters saw no available interview slots for all panel interviewers after reconnecting Google Calendar.
cause: The reconnect flow completed without the calendar.freebusy scope because the workspace admin restricted third-party scopes.
resolution: Scheduling Integrations guided admin approval, reconnected affected calendars, and refreshed availability cache.

subject: UrbanLoop Google Calendar availability not visible
summary: UrbanLoop reported google calendar availability not visible during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Google OAuth token lacked freebusy scope
resolution: Reconnected Google Calendar with the required scope

subject: VectorAI Interviewers show no free slots
summary: VectorAI reported interviewers show no free slots during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Interviewer calendar sharing was private
resolution: Updated free/busy sharing and refreshed availability cache

subject: Willow Pharma Room calendar hidden from scheduler
summary: Willow Pharma reported room calendar hidden from scheduler during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Working hours were set to the wrong time zone
resolution: Corrected interviewer time zones and reran availability sync

subject: XenoFleet OAuth reconnect did not restore free/busy
summary: XenoFleet reported oauth reconnect did not restore free/busy during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Resource calendar was outside the synced domain
resolution: Added room calendar to allowed resources and verified scheduling

summary: YieldWise reported google calendar availability not visible during a recruiting workflow.
